articles.title: Flights Canceled! What to Do If Your Summer Trip Gets Grounded
articles.summary: Airlines are canceling flights because jet fuel costs are rising. If your flight gets canceled, you might get a refund or help rebooking. Check your airline's app first!

articles.title: Peace Talks on Hold: Trump Cancels Trip to Pakistan at the Last Minute
articles.summary: President Trump canceled his team's trip to Pakistan for Iran peace talks. Iran's foreign minister had just left. Trump says they'll talk by phone instead. The ceasefire with Iran is shaky.

articles.title: Trump Finally Goes to the White House Press Dinner—But No Comedian!
articles.summary: President Trump attended his first White House Correspondents' Dinner as president. He had skipped it five times before. This year, there was no comedian—and journalists called on him to protect press freedom.
